problem id: 55bc6738
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) OR SHR(3)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  01001001 -> 10000000
  01110000 -> 00001000
  11101110 -> 01110101
  11101111 -> 11110101
  00001110 -> 00000001
  01000000 -> 00000000
  00110110 -> 00000010
  10001000 -> 00000000
  10011110 -> 01000011

query: 00011001
predicted answer: 10000000
